title: VN4's Despacito Spiders
description: This pack replaces spiders with that one roblox meme.
body:

#
This pack replaces spiders with that one roblox meme.

<details>
<summary>Includes:</summary>
  
- ### A new look for the spiders.
  ![DS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26eada22d5441dc39c3cfd0d6643f7ffce7c99b9.png)
- ### A new look for the cave spiders.
  ![DCS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d0b8a1f30e23cc105cda823f17de0198b6bf29f.png)
</details>

![requirements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fc9f511dc95fdeb95f153ee45915f317eb37f4e.png)
